final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer with power gating capability. It selects one of two 5-bit inputs based on a single select line. When the power gating signal is high, the multiplexer should not pass any signal, effectively turning off the output.
module mux2to1 (
    input wire [4:0] a,
    input wire [4:0] b,
    input wire sel,
    input wire power_gating,
    output reg [4:0] y
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (!power_gating) begin
            y = 5'b00000; // Output is off when power gating is active
        end else begin
            case (sel)
                1'b0: y = a; // Select input a
                1'b1: y = b; // Select input b
                default: y = 5'b00000; // Default case
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer with power gating capability. It selects one of two 5-bit inputs based on a single select line. When the power gating signal is high, the multiplexer should not pass any signal, effectively turning off the output.
